mechanism_explanation: Excessive pressure can cause the steel to deform beyond its elastic limit, resulting in a bent shape. The material is unable to return to its original form, leading to permanent deformation. Misalignment of the die exacerbates this issue by not guiding the material correctly.
severity_visual_description: noticeable bending that affects fit and function
corrective_action: calibrate equipment and ensure proper die alignment
counterfactual_prediction: the nut aligns correctly with the reference profile, showing no visible deformation
